case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. RODRIGO DE ASSIS BRANDAO DE OLIVEIRA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED JUL-09-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DE OLIVEIRA, RODRIGO DE ASSIS BRANDAO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE OLIVEIRA, RODRIGO DE ASSIS BRANDAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $987.29 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT DE OLIVEIRA, RODRIGO DE ASSIS BRANDAO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DE OLIVEIRA, RODRIGO DE ASSIS BRANDAO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE OLIVEIRA, RODRIGO DE ASSIS BRANDAO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DE OLIVEIRA, RODRIGO DE ASSIS BRANDAO
